steps.step_description: Attacker calls withdraw or claim function
steps.code_signal: public/external function with ETH transfer

steps.step_description: Contract reads attacker balance before state update
steps.code_signal: balances[msg.sender] read before decrement

steps.step_description: Contract sends ETH to attacker before updating state
steps.code_signal: call.value() or transfer() before balance--

steps.step_description: Attacker receive() or fallback() calls withdraw again
steps.code_signal: receive() or fallback() with external call back

steps.step_description: Loop repeats until contract is empty
steps.code_signal: balance not yet decremented on reentry

steps.step_description: Attacker calls function that transfers tokens
steps.code_signal: safeTransfer or transfer before state update

steps.step_description: ERC777 tokensReceived or ERC1155 onReceived fires
steps.code_signal: tokensReceived() or onERC1155Received()

steps.step_description: Hook calls a different function that reads stale state
steps.code_signal: shared storage variable read in second function

steps.step_description: Second function acts on balance not yet updated by first
steps.code_signal: accounting mismatch between two functions

steps.step_description: Attacker triggers state transition in Protocol A
steps.code_signal: remove_liquidity or withdraw with ETH callback

steps.step_description: ETH callback fires before Protocol A updates its state
steps.code_signal: receive() triggered during Curve or Balancer exit

steps.step_name: Read Stale Price from Protocol A
steps.step_description: Inside callback, attacker reads get_virtual_price or similar
steps.code_signal: get_virtual_price() or balanceOf() call to Protocol A

steps.step_description: Protocol B uses that stale price for borrow or collateral valuation
steps.code_signal: external price read used in collateral calculation

steps.step_description: Inflated collateral value allows undercollateralized borrow
steps.code_signal: borrow limit computed from manipulated price

steps.step_description: Attacker borrows large amount of token from flash loan provider
steps.code_signal: flashLoan() or flashSwap() call

steps.step_description: Attacker swaps borrowed amount into target pool, skewing reserves
steps.code_signal: swap() or sync() on AMM pool

steps.step_description: Victim protocol reads manipulated spot price from pool
steps.code_signal: getReserves() or balanceOf(pool) used as price

steps.step_description: Attacker borrows against inflated collateral or triggers liquidation
steps.code_signal: borrow() or liquidate() using oracle price

steps.step_description: Attacker repays flash loan and keeps profit
steps.code_signal: repay within same transaction

steps.step_description: Target protocol uses TWAP with window under 30 minutes
steps.code_signal: consult() with period < 1800

steps.step_description: Attacker holds skewed position across multiple blocks
steps.code_signal: repeated swaps to maintain price deviation

steps.step_description: Time-weighted average shifts toward attacker-controlled price
steps.code_signal: observe() returns attacker-influenced cumulative price

steps.step_description: Attacker borrows or liquidates using now-manipulated TWAP
steps.code_signal: borrow limit or liquidation using TWAP output

steps.step_description: Critical function has no access control modifier
steps.code_signal: public function without onlyOwner or onlyRole

steps.step_description: Attacker calls function from any EOA
steps.code_signal: no msg.sender check

steps.step_description: Function executes drain, upgrade, or ownership transfer
steps.code_signal: transfer() or selfdestruct() or upgradeTo() in body

steps.step_description: Contract exposes delegatecall with user-influenced target or data
steps.code_signal: delegatecall(target) where target from calldata or storage

steps.step_description: Attacker passes address of malicious contract as target
steps.code_signal: user-controlled address passed to delegatecall

steps.step_description: Malicious contract runs with victim storage and balance
steps.code_signal: arbitrary code running in victim contract context

steps.step_description: Attacker transfers funds or overwrites owner slot
steps.code_signal: storage slot 0 overwrite or ETH transfer

steps.step_description: Contract uses Solidity < 0.8.0 or unchecked block
steps.code_signal: pragma solidity ^0.7 or unchecked { arithmetic }

steps.step_description: Attacker passes value that causes wrap-around
steps.code_signal: user-controlled uint256 near MAX_UINT or 0

steps.step_description: Addition overflows to small number or subtraction underflows to MAX_UINT
steps.code_signal: balance or supply wraps to unexpected value

steps.step_description: Attacker withdraws inflated balance or bypasses limit check
steps.code_signal: transfer or mint using wrapped value

steps.step_description: Formula divides before multiplying losing precision
steps.code_signal: a / b * c pattern in financial calculation

steps.step_description: Attacker supplies value where division truncates significantly
steps.code_signal: small deposit or fee calculation truncating to zero

steps.step_description: Attacker repeats operation many times to accumulate rounding benefit
steps.code_signal: loop or repeated calls extracting dust each time

steps.step_description: Attacker borrows maximum available capital in one tx
steps.code_signal: flashLoan() call at start of transaction

steps.step_description: Large capital used to move price, liquidity, or votes
steps.code_signal: swap/deposit/vote with borrowed amount

steps.step_description: Attacker exploits manipulated state to withdraw profit
steps.code_signal: borrow/liquidate/withdraw after state manipulation

steps.step_description: Flash loan repaid, attacker keeps extracted value
steps.code_signal: repay call at end of transaction

steps.step_description: Attacker finds or creates a valid cross-chain message
steps.code_signal: executeMessage() or processMessage() call

steps.step_description: Bridge processes message and mints or releases funds
steps.code_signal: mint() or transfer() triggered by message

steps.step_description: Bridge does not mark message as processed
steps.code_signal: no processedMessages[hash] = true after execution

steps.step_description: Attacker submits same message again, funds released again
steps.code_signal: same calldata submitted in new transaction

steps.step_description: Attacker flash borrows enough tokens for majority vote
steps.code_signal: flashLoan() of governance token

steps.step_description: Attacker uses or creates proposal to drain treasury
steps.code_signal: propose() with malicious calldata

steps.step_description: Voting power from current balance, not snapshot
steps.code_signal: balanceOf(msg.sender) used in castVote()

steps.step_description: No timelock allows same-block execution
steps.code_signal: execute() callable in same transaction as vote

steps.step_description: Proposal executes fund transfer to attacker
steps.code_signal: transfer() to attacker address in proposal payload

steps.step_description: Governance tokens returned, attacker keeps treasury funds
steps.code_signal: repay at end of transaction

steps.step_description: Attacker deposits 1 wei to receive initial shares
steps.code_signal: deposit(1) when totalSupply == 0

steps.step_description: Attacker transfers large amount directly to vault, bypassing deposit
steps.code_signal: token.transfer(vault, largeAmount) not via deposit()

steps.step_description: totalAssets() increases but totalSupply stays at 1
steps.code_signal: convertToShares returns 0 for small deposits

steps.step_description: Victim deposits reasonable amount, receives 0 shares due to rounding
steps.code_signal: deposit() returning 0 shares to victim

steps.step_description: Attacker redeems 1 share for all assets including victim deposit
steps.code_signal: redeem(1) returning attacker + victim assets

steps.step_description: Attacker opens position or finds victim position near liquidation
steps.code_signal: borrow() with collateral near threshold

steps.step_description: Attacker moves spot price of collateral asset
steps.code_signal: swap on thin pool affecting oracle price

steps.step_description: Price drop puts position underwater, liquidation becomes profitable
steps.code_signal: liquidate() callable after price manipulation

steps.step_description: Attacker liquidates and collects liquidation bonus
steps.code_signal: liquidationBonus applied to collateral seized

steps.step_description: Protocol calls transfer() or transferFrom() without checking bool return
steps.code_signal: token.transfer() not wrapped in require() or SafeERC20

steps.step_description: Non-standard token returns false instead of reverting
steps.code_signal: USDT or custom token returning false on failure

steps.step_description: Protocol updates internal accounting despite transfer failure
steps.code_signal: balance incremented after silent transfer failure

steps.step_description: Attacker withdraws credited balance that was never actually transferred in
steps.code_signal: withdraw() against balance that was never funded
